changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_monsters ( source_external_id text, slug text, name_rusloc text, name_engloc text, alignment_code text, size text, size_secondary text, is_swarm text, swarm_size text, armor_class text, armor_class_text text, initiative_bonus text, initiative_score text, hp_average text, hp_dice_count text, hp_dice_sides text, hp_dice_modifier text, hp_formula text, str_score text, dex_score text, con_score text, int_score text, wis_score text, cha_score text, passive_perception text, telepathy_ft text, cr_rating text, cr_value text, xp_base text, xp_lair text, proficiency_bonus text, legendary_uses_base text, legendary_uses_lair text, legendary_text text, lore_text text, campaign_id text, homebrew_id text );

INSERT INTO monsters ( source_external_id, slug, name_rusloc, name_engloc, alignment_id, size, size_secondary, is_swarm, swarm_size, armor_class, armor_class_text, initiative_bonus, initiative_score, hp_average, hp_dice_count, hp_dice_sides, hp_dice_modifier, hp_formula, str_score, dex_score, con_score, int_score, wis_score, cha_score, passive_perception, telepathy_ft, cr_rating, cr_value, xp_base, xp_lair, proficiency_bonus, legendary_uses_base, legendary_uses_lair, legendary_text, lore_text, campaign_id, homebrew_id ) SELECT NULLIF(s.source_external_id, '')::bigint, s.slug, s.name_rusloc, NULLIF(s.name_engloc, ''), (SELECT a.id FROM alignments a WHERE a.code = NULLIF(s.alignment_code, '') AND a.homebrew_id IS NULL), s.size, NULLIF(s.size_secondary, ''), NULLIF(s.is_swarm, '')::boolean, NULLIF(s.swarm_size, ''), s.armor_class::smallint, NULLIF(s.armor_class_text, ''), NULLIF(s.initiative_bonus, '')::smallint, NULLIF(s.initiative_score, '')::smallint, NULLIF(s.hp_average, '')::int, NULLIF(s.hp_dice_count, '')::smallint, NULLIF(s.hp_dice_sides, '')::smallint, NULLIF(s.hp_dice_modifier, '')::int, NULLIF(s.hp_formula, ''), s.str_score::smallint, s.dex_score::smallint, s.con_score::smallint, s.int_score::smallint, s.wis_score::smallint, s.cha_score::smallint, NULLIF(s.passive_perception, '')::smallint, NULLIF(s.telepathy_ft, '')::int, s.cr_rating, s.cr_value::numeric(5,3), NULLIF(s.xp_base, '')::int, NULLIF(s.xp_lair, '')::int, NULLIF(s.proficiency_bonus, '')::smallint, NULLIF(s.legendary_uses_base, '')::smallint, NULLIF(s.legendary_uses_lair, '')::smallint, NULLIF(s.legendary_text, ''), NULLIF(s.lore_text, ''), NULLIF(s.campaign_id, '')::uuid, NULLIF(s.homebrew_id, '')::uuid FROM seed_stg_monsters s WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM monsters m WHERE m.source_external_id = NULLIF(s.source_external_id, '')::bigint ); DROP TABLE seed_stg_monsters;

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_mct (monster_external_id text, creature_type_code text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_speeds (monster_external_id text, movement_type_code text, ft text, hover text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_senses (monster_external_id text, sense_type_code text, ft text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_langs (monster_external_id text, language_code text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_saves (monster_external_id text, ability text, bonus text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_skills (monster_external_id text, skill_name text, bonus text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_dres (monster_external_id text, damage_type text, note text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_dimm (monster_external_id text, damage_type text, note text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_dvul (monster_external_id text, damage_type text, note text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_cond (monster_external_id text, condition_code text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_hab (monster_external_id text, habitat_code text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_treas (monster_external_id text, treasure_tag_code text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_msrc (monster_external_id text, source_code text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE seed_stg_gear (monster_external_id text, gear_code text, qty text);

changeSet.author: bestiary
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO monster_features ( monster_id, section, sort_order, name_rusloc, name_engloc, kind, recharge_min, recharge_max, description_rusloc, description_engloc, attack_type, attack_bonus, reach_ft, range_ft, range_long_ft, save_ability, save_dc, seed_feature_key ) SELECT m.id, s.section, s.sort_order::int, NULLIF(s.name_rusloc, ''), NULLIF(s.name_engloc, ''), s.kind, NULLIF(s.recharge_min, '')::smallint, NULLIF(s.recharge_max, '')::smallint, s.description_rusloc, NULLIF(s.description_engloc, ''), NULLIF(s.attack_type, ''), NULLIF(s.attack_bonus, '')::smallint, NULLIF(s.reach_ft, '')::smallint, NULLIF(s.range_ft, '')::smallint, NULLIF(s.range_long_ft, '')::smallint, NULLIF(s.save_ability, ''), NULLIF(s.save_dc, '')::smallint, s.feature_key FROM seed_stg_features s JOIN monsters m ON m.source_external_id = s.monster_external_id::bigint WHERE NULLIF(s.description_rusloc, '') IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM monster_features f WHERE f.seed_feature_key = s.feature_key ); DROP TABLE seed_stg_features;
CREATE TABLE seed_stg_feature_damages ( feature_key text, sort_order text, average text, dice text, damage_type text, note text );
